key_responsibilities: Write clean, maintainable code in Java or Python
Monitor production systems and improve observability
Lead root cause analyses for outages
Partner with business users to troubleshoot issues
Execute manual workflows and automate them
Contribute to and maintain team knowledge bases
relevant_data: Warner Music Group operates in the entertainment industry with approximately 5,500 employees.
Recently announced plans to make 600 employees redundant and was named to TIME's list of the 100 Most Influential Companies.
Known for its strong culture and work-life balance, fostering creativity and innovation, recognized for supportive environment and career growth opportunities.
